title: Rewrite it in Lisp?
summary: I finally got around to paying some money for Beautiful Racket [^1], a fantastic online only book that introduces you to Racket by guiding you through building a few language implementations. In that sense it's not unlike Write Yourself a Scheme in 48 Hours [^2], except that book
content: I finally got around to paying some money for Beautiful Racket [^1], a fantastic online only book that introduces you to Racket by guiding you through building a few language implementations. In that sense it's not unlike Write Yourself a Scheme in 48 Hours [^2], except that book
